title: Knife attack suspect shot dead by police after injuring 3 in New York
summary_full: A knife-wielding man, identified as Anthony Griffen, fatally shot by NYPD officers at Grand Central subway station after injuring three people. Griffen, who claimed to be "Lucifer," advanced on officers with a large knife. Authorities confirmed no link to terrorism, and the victims are in stable condition.
